productDisplayName: Fabindia Red Jaipur Print Cotton Sari
description: Style Notefabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference the style of the contemporary using ethnic garments and fabric. This sari perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its styling and colour patterning. This beautiful piece has been hand block printed - a lengthy process which ensures that each sari has a unique hand-crafted touch. Choose this sari to express your appreciation of traditional techniques and to support Indian craftspeople who are keeping these art forms alive.Product DetailsBeige Jaipur hand printed sari with contrast red detailsMaterial and CareCottonThis unique fabric has been dyed/ printed using traditional dyeing processes. Some colours may initially transfer when in dry or wet contact with light coloured fabrics or upholstery. This transfer will reduce after a few washes but we recommend that you wash the product separately for the first few washes.SizeLength: 5.7 metres (no blouse piece)
